title: Hohhot, Inner Mongolia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Hohhot, Inner Mongolia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Hohhot is a city in Inner Mongolia with a population of 3,446,000. Capital of Inner Mongolia, a city where Mongolian and Han cultures meet, known for its grasslands, dairy industry, and Buddhist temples.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
